# qwraps2 ![](reference/figures/qwraps2logo.png)

[![Project Status: Active – The project has reached a stable, usable
state and is being actively
developed.](https://www.repostatus.org/badges/latest/active.svg)](https://www.repostatus.org/#active)
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/dewittpe/qwraps2/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/dewittpe/qwraps2/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
[![codecov](https://app.codecov.io/gh/dewittpe/qwraps2/branch/master/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/dewittpe/qwraps2)

[![OpenSSF Best
Practices](https://www.bestpractices.dev/projects/8049/badge)](https://www.bestpractices.dev/projects/8049)

[![CRAN_Status_Badge](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/qwraps2)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=qwraps2)
[![CRAN RStudio mirror
downloads](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/qwraps2)](https://www.r-pkg.org/pkg/qwraps2)
[![CRAN RStudio mirror
downloads](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/qwraps2)](https://www.r-pkg.org/pkg/qwraps2)

[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/licence-GPL--3-blue.svg)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html)
[![minimal R
version](https://img.shields.io/badge/R%3E%3D-3.5.0-6666ff.svg)](https://cran.r-project.org/)

A collection of helpful functions for summarizing data and formatting
results. These or similar functions can be found in other R packages on
github.com or on CRAN. However, this is a collection of methods I have
generated to help with particular projects I have worked on over the
last several years. Using my original `qwraps` package as the
foundation, this work is aimed at simplicity and ease of use.

Some of the tools provided by `qwraps2` are:

- Formatting results:
  - `frmt`, `frmtci`, and `frmtp` make it easier to consistently format
    numeric values, confidence intervals, and p-values in reports.
  - `qable` is a wrapper around
    [`knitr::kable`](https://rdrr.io/pkg/knitr/man/kable.html) with my
    preferred defaults.
  - `summary_table` is used to generate data summary tables in markdown
    or LaTeX
  - `mean_ci`, `mean_sd`, `median_iqr`, `n_perc` make it easy to report
    formatted summary statistics.
- Plotting: Tools for building specific types of plots in
  [ggplot2](https://cran.r-project.org/package=ggplot2)
  - `qacf`: Autocorrelation plots
  - `qblandaltman`: Bland Altman plots
  - `qkmplot`: Kaplan-Meier plots
  - `qprc`: Precision Recall Curves
  - `qroc`: Receiver Operator Curves
  - `ggplot2_extract_legend`: extract the legend from a ggplot.
- R Programming and Development
  - `lazyload_cache` Load the cache generated by knitr into an
    interactive session.
- Other Tools:
  - `confusion_matrix`: building and generate statistics for confusion
    matrices.
  - `logit` and `invlogit`: quick logit and inverse logit functions
  - `ll`: a variant for [`ls()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/ls.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contribute!

If you have a particular task or function used for data summaries or for
reporting that you think would be helpful to include in this package
please fork the repo, add the feature, and send me a pull request.

### Building the package

Use the `Makefile`. After cloning the repo, a simple call

``` R
make
```

will build the package. This includes generating man files via
[roxygen2](https://cran.r-project.org/package=roxygen2), building the
vignettes, and then building the package via `R CMD build .`. Passing
arguments to `R CMD build` can be done too. For example, building the
package without the vignettes is done via:

``` R
make build-options=--no-build-vignettes
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Install

### From CRAN

Download and install from the RStudio [The Comprehensive R Archive
Network (CRAN)](https://cran.r-project.org/) mirror.

``` R
install.packages("qwraps2", repo = "https://cran.rstudio.com")
```

### Developmental

Install the development version of `qwraps2` directly from github via
the [`remotes`](https://github.com/r-lib/remotes/) package:

``` R
if (!("remotes" %in% rownames(installed.packages()))) {
  warning("installing remotes from https://cran.rstudio.com")
  install.packages("remotes", repo = "https://cran.rstudio.com")
}

remotes::install_github("dewittpe/qwraps2", build_vignettes = TRUE)
```

*NOTE:* If you are working on a Windows machine you will need to
download and install
[`Rtools`](https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/).

*NOTE:* If you are using macOS and R 4.3.0 or higher, you’ll need to
make sure you have the needed compilers. See [R for macOS Development
Tools and Libraries](https://cran.r-project.org/bin/macosx/tools/)

### Cloned repo

Install with GNU `make`

``` R
make install
```

# Package index

## Summary Tables

Build formatted summary tables from data frames.

- [`summary_table()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/summary_table.md)
  [`qsummary()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/summary_table.md)
  : Data Summary Tables
- [`qable()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qable.md) :
  qable: an extended version of knitr::kable

## Formatting Summary Statistics

Format numeric summaries, p-values, confidence intervals, and package
names.

- [`frmt()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/frmt.md)
  [`frmtp()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/frmt.md)
  [`frmtci()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/frmt.md) :
  Format Wrappers
- [`mean_sd()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/mean_sd.md)
  : Mean and Standard deviation
- [`mean_se()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/mean_se.md)
  : Mean and Standard Error (of the mean)
- [`mean_ci()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/mean_ci.md)
  [`print(`*`<qwraps2_mean_ci>`*`)`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/mean_ci.md)
  : Means and Confidence Intervals
- [`median_iqr()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/median_iqr.md)
  : Median and Inner Quartile Range
- [`n_perc()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/n_perc.md)
  [`perc_n()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/n_perc.md)
  [`n_perc0()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/n_perc.md)
  : Count and Percentage
- [`gmean()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/gmean.md)
  [`gvar()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/gmean.md)
  [`gsd()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/gmean.md) :
  Geometric Mean, Variance, and Standard Deviation
- [`gmean_sd()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/gmean_sd.md)
  : Geometric Mean and Standard deviation
- [`Rpkg()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/Rpkg.md)
  [`CRANpkg()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/Rpkg.md)
  [`Githubpkg()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/Rpkg.md)
  [`GitHubpkg()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/Rpkg.md)
  [`Gitlabpkg()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/Rpkg.md)
  : Formatting Style on URLs for packages on CRAN, Github, and Gitlab.
- [`backtick()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/backtick.md)
  : Backtick

## Graphics

ggplot2-based helper plots.

- [`qacf()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qacf.md) :
  Autocorrelation plot
- [`qblandaltman()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qblandaltman.md)
  [`qblandaltman_build_data_frame()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qblandaltman.md)
  : Bland Altman Plots
- [`qkmplot()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qkmplot.md)
  [`qkmplot_build_data_frame()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qkmplot.md)
  [`qrmst()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qkmplot.md)
  : Kaplan-Meier Plot
- [`qroc()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qroc-qprc.md)
  [`qprc()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qroc-qprc.md)
  : Receiver Operating Characteristic and Precision-Recall Curves
- [`stat_stepribbon()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/stat_stepribbon.md)
  : Step ribbon statistic
- [`StatStepribbon`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/StatStepribbon.md)
  : Stat Step Ribbon
- [`ggplot2_extract_legend()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/ggplot2_tools.md)
  : ggplot2 tools

## Classification Metrics

- [`confusion_matrix()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/confusion_matrix.md)
  [`print(`*`<qwraps2_confusion_matrix>`*`)`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/confusion_matrix.md)
  : Confusion Matrices (Contingency Tables)

## Data

- [`mtcars2`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/mtcars2.md)
  : mtcars2
- [`pefr`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/pefr.md) : pefr
- [`spambase`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/spambase.md)
  : Spambase

## Utilities

- [`file_check()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/file_check.md)
  : File and Working Directory Check
- [`pkg_check()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/pkg_check.md)
  : Package Checks
- [`lazyload_cache_dir()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/lazyload_cache.md)
  [`lazyload_cache_labels()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/lazyload_cache.md)
  : Lazyload Cache
- [`ll()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/ll.md) : List
  Object Aliases
- [`set_diff()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/set_diff.md)
  [`print(`*`<qwraps2_set_diff>`*`)`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/set_diff.md)
  : Set Differences
- [`spin_comments()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/spin_comments.md)
  : Spin Comment Check
- [`check_comments()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/check_comments.md)
  : Check Comments
- [`traprule()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/traprule.md)
  : Trapezoid Rule Numeric Integration
- [`extract_fstat()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/extract.md)
  [`extract_fpvalue()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/extract.md)
  : Extract Summary stats from regression objects
- [`` `%s%` ``](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qwraps2-utilities.md)
  : Operators

## Deprecated Functions

Retained for backward compatibility.

- [`logit()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/logit.md)
  [`invlogit()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/logit.md)
  : Deprecated logit and invlogit
- [`qkmplot_bulid_data_frame()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qkmplot_bulid_data_frame.md)
  : Deprecated qkmplot data-frame builder
- [`qroc_build_data_frame()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qroc_build_data_frame.md)
  [`qprc_build_data_frame()`](http://www.peteredewitt.com/qwraps2/reference/qroc_build_data_frame.md)
  : Deprecated qroc and qprc building of data frames:
